name: Fabric Shoe Bin with Lid Light Gray - Brightroom™: Square Storage with Handles, Fits 13" Cube System, No Assembly Required
description:
Whether you're storing some beloved out-of-season booties or a special occasion handbag, this Fabric Shoe Bin with Lid from Brightroom™ makes it easy to keep shoes, accessories, bags and more organized and out of sight in your closet. The shoebox-size container is made of fabric for a soft, flexible and light feel, and comes with a matching lid to keep items contained and dust-free. Built-in fabric handles on both the short and long side of the box make it easy to slide out when placed on a closet or organizer shelf.

Brightroom™ started with a simple truth: When you’ve got it together, you feel better. Our versatile designs reveal the possibility in every closet, cupboard and drawer, and work together to create brilliant ways to organize your every day.
